Name: ToyOptionsComponent_GEN_VARIABLE
Flags: RF_Public | RF_Transactional | RF_ArchetypeObject | RF_WasLoaded | RF_LoadCompleted | RF_InheritableComponentTemplate

Internal_OptionsDescription.SourceString: Generates a configurable random number which can be sent through trigger channels or used to activate devices in a volume.
